revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''4-2-400

The continuous tone signal transmitted by a direction finder station to enable a distant receiving antenna to be aligned on the transmitter for the purpose of taking a bearing.

{{IALAFooter}}
